title: nertera arnottiana
intro: Nertera arnottiana, also known as the 'Myrtle Sundew' or 'Nertera', is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This small, succulent plant is native to New Zealand and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nertera arnottiana include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a potential natural remedy for various skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
